name: google.com HTTP 200
description: Simple connectivity test verifying google.com returns HTTP 200 OK. Useful for validating that the test runner has general internet access and can reach external endpoints.
preconditions:
- Internet access available
- No firewall blocking google.com
- DNS resolution working
expectedBehavior:
- Response status 200
- Response time < 2000ms
- Content-Type header present
documentation:
## google.com HTTP 200

Simple smoke test to verify internet connectivity and basic HTTP functionality.

### Steps
1. Send HTTP GET to https://google.com
2. Assert status code is 200
3. Assert response time under 2000ms
4. Capture Content-Type header
